expectations.text: Adds role='combobox' to the input or wrapping element
Includes aria-expanded to reflect open/closed state
expectations.evidence: aria-expanded included with instruction to update in JS

expectations.text: Includes aria-controls pointing to the listbox
Adds role='listbox' to the results list
Adds role='option' to each result item
expectations.evidence: role='option' on each <li> with unique ids

expectations.text: Mentions aria-activedescendant for tracking highlighted option
expectations.evidence: aria-activedescendant explained in detail; key insight that real focus never leaves the input

expectations.text: Covers keyboard pattern: arrows to navigate, Enter to select, Escape to close
expectations.evidence: Full keyboard table covering Down/Up, Enter, Escape, Tab
